profile.name: Shrutosom Bala
profile.title: Software Developer
profile.summary: Cloud native backend engineer with a passion for automation and scalable systems.

projects.name: Porfolio
projects.description: Browse IPL teams, past games, win/loss ratios using Spring Boot backend and React front-end with data sourced from Kaggle.

experience.summary: Lead developer on insurance/financial applications using Java, Spring Boot, Node and AWS.
highlights: Primarily working as the Lead Developer of an Agile team for an Insurance Client. Developing & Maintaining JEE,Spring - Boot, Node,Cloud based & Custom Financial applications. Forging robust relationships with clients and understanding business requirements. Mentoring and guiding fresh talent within the org & team

Spearheaded as the Lead Java Developer in automating Migration of IBM Business rule management system (BRMS)  to Client Internal BRMS using Lexical Analysis & Syntax Analysis in Java to generate JS. The automation resulted in 50% reduction of manual efforts. Thanks to the automation 10,000 Rules were migrated to the Client BRMS platform within a period of 1 Year. Rewarded with Accenture ACE award
Developed internal company dashboard using Spring Boot, Thymeleaf & HTMX eliminating dependency on data team. Made the non techincal staff very happy :)
Evaluated alternatives and recommended Apache Camel for deprecating IBM DataPower gateway
Mentored junior team members and liaised with clients to shape requirements
